## Type Inventory


These are the package-level message and enum shapes in the publish-version snapshot.




<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-daml-platform-v1-listpartiespagetokenpayload">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-schema-head">
    <h3>daml.platform.v1.ListPartiesPageTokenPayload</h3>
    
    <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-summary">1 fields</p>
    
  </div>
  
  <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-description">Describes the payload of a page token for listing parties. Not intended to be handled directly by clients and should be presented to them as an opaque string.</p>
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">party_id_lower_bound_excl</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Parties are ordered by ``party_id``, and the next page starts with parties whose ``party_id`` is larger than ``party_id_lower_bound_excl``.</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>

<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-daml-platform-v1-listuserspagetokenpayload">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-schema-head">
    <h3>daml.platform.v1.ListUsersPageTokenPayload</h3>
    
    <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-summary">1 fields</p>
    
  </div>
  
  <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-description">Describes the payload of a page token for listing users. Not intended to be handled directly by clients and should be presented to them as an opaque string.</p>
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">user_id_lower_bound_excl</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Users are ordered by ``user_id``, and the next page starts with users whose ``user_id`` is larger than ``user_id_lower_bound_excl``.</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>

<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-daml-platform-v1-listvettedpackagespagetokenpayload">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-schema-head">
    <h3>daml.platform.v1.ListVettedPackagesPageTokenPayload</h3>
    
    <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-summary">2 fields</p>
    
  </div>
  
  <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-description">Describes the payload of a page token for listing vetted packages. Not intended to be handled directly by clients and should be presented to them as an opaque string.</p>
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">synchronizer_id</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">VettedPackages are ordered by ``synchronizer_id`` and then ``participant_id``. The next page starts with VettedPackages messages whose synchronizer ID is strictly larger ``synchronizer_id``, or whose synchronizer ID is equal to ``synchronizer_id`` and whose participant ID is strictly larger than ``participant_id``.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">participant_id</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>

<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-daml-platform-v1-statusdetails">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-schema-head">
    <h3>daml.platform.v1.StatusDetails</h3>
    
    <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-summary">1 fields</p>
    
  </div>
  
  <p class="x2mdx-ref-schema-description">Serialized status details, conveyed from the driver `ReadService` to the ledger API client. To be combined with a status code and message.</p>
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">details</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated Any</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
